whatsnew: Build: Removed legacy PerformanceStudio submodule + Plan Analyzer page (was breaking CI builds)
Release: Fixed automated release pipeline — exe and ZIP now publish to GitHub Releases on tag push
CI: Restore now uses -r win-x64 so the runtime pack is fetched (NETSDK1112 fix)
Tests: ErrorCatalog golden file now committed and copied to test output directory
UX: Bottom-right server-mode toggle no longer overlaps the no-pants/mute status badges
UX: Check Validator page styles restored (extracted from commented-out style block to wwwroot/css/CheckValidator.css)
